text:
First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
BIPL_MEDICARE_EVER Bipolar Disorder - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
DEPSN_COMBINED Depression - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
DEPSN_MEDICAID Depression - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
DEPSN_MEDICARE Depression - Medicare
